title: Yijing Hexagram 40: Jie (Deliverance)
description: Hexagram 40 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 40 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Deliverance. The southwest furthers. If there is no longer anything where one has to go, return brings good fortune.
